name: PHI Composite Detection
summary: Triggers when both a medical record number and date of birth appear together
description: Composite rule that triggers only when both a medical identifier (MRN) and a personal identifier (DOB) appear together in the same content. This combination constitutes Protected Health Information (PHI) under HIPAA and warrants elevated protection.

metadata.compliance_notes: Combination of medical + personal identifiers constitutes PHI under HIPAA Privacy Rule
metadata.composite_logic: Triggers when MRN AND DOB are both present in the same content

effect.message: PHI detected: medical record number combined with date of birth constitutes Protected Health Information under HIPAA. Content tokenized for safe handling.
